scripts.test-positive: node tests/test-success.js && node tests/test-insufficient-funds.js && node tests/test-negative-amount.js && node tests/test-commission.js && node tests/test-short-card.js
scripts.test-defects: node tests/test-empty-amount.js && node tests/test-defect-boundary.js && node tests/test-defect-card.js
scripts.test: npm run test-positive && npm run test-empty-amount
scripts.test-all-local: node tests/test-success.js & node tests/test-insufficient-funds.js & node tests/test-negative-amount.js & node tests/test-commission.js & node tests/test-short-card.js & node tests/test-empty-amount.js & node tests/test-defect-boundary.js & node tests/test-defect-card.js
